name: Outbreak
description:
I really hope this one goes well.

Welcome to the apocalypse and don't worry there's a fair share few of them there's the infection making ponies Decay from the inside out. There's A parasite in Crystal Kingdom Creating a hive mind Multiple Rebel groups Raiders. Nuclear Fallout And so much more Feel free to explore this hellscape And survive...Or not

I have no idea how to do these I'm just hoping this turns out well Y'all enjoy it.

Also if you have any questions please comment.

Possibly going to need updates that I might do idk i have nothing in my example dialogues and probably needs more testing y'all let me know.
creator: chess's
